tests.name: useGenerateActionCallback - redirectTo interface compliance > should accept the redirectTo parameter and return a callable action callback
useGenerateActionCallback - redirectTo interface compliance > should return UseActionCallback when redirectTo is provided
useGenerateActionCallback - redirectTo interface compliance > should return a callable action callback when redirectTo is absent
useGenerateActionHook - redirectTo interface compliance > should forward redirectTo to useGenerateActionCallback
useGenerateActionHook - redirectTo interface compliance > should not include redirectTo when it is not provided
CTAButton redirect flow > should redirect to a non-checkout URL when promotional condition is active and upgrade button is clicked
CTAButton redirect flow > should redirect to checkout URL when promotional condition is inactive and upgrade button is clicked
CTAButton redirect flow > should preserve plugin slug in redirect URL when promotional condition is active
CTAButton redirect flow > should call useIsPluginAvailableOnAllPlans hook when rendering
PlanUSPS > should show generic all paid plans text when promotional condition is active for Personal plan
PlanUSPS > should show plan-specific text when promotional condition is inactive
PlanUSPS > should not apply promotional pricing for marketplace products
PlanUSPS > should not apply promotional pricing for preinstalled premium plugins
PlanUSPS > should return null when shouldUpgrade is false
PlanUSPS > should not show promo text when shouldUpgrade is false even if promo is active
PlanUSPS > should use monthly cost label when promotional condition is active
PlanUSPS > should show generic text for Business plan tier when promotional condition is active
PlanUSPS > should show Business plan specific text when promotional condition is inactive
useIsPluginAvailableOnAllPlans > should return true when useSummerSpecialStatus returns true
useIsPluginAvailableOnAllPlans > should return false when useSummerSpecialStatus returns false
useIsPluginAvailableOnAllPlans > should handle null siteId and return the delegated value
useIsPluginAvailableOnAllPlans > should forward siteId and isInSignup to useSummerSpecialStatus
